case_title: WENDY NICHOLSEN VS. DAMYAN MARCELL ROCHELL JR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LY. PLAINTIFF WENDY NICHOLSEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAMYAN MARCELL ROCHELL JR. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2023; JUDGMENT DEBTOR DAMYAN MARCELL ROCHELL JR FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. JUDGEMENT CREDITOR WENDY NICHOLSEN IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR DAMYAN MARCELL ROCHELL JR. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
